name: Rogue

abilities.name: Sinister Strike
abilities.desc: An instant strike for weapon damage plus $d. Awards 1 combo point.

abilities.name: Eviscerate
abilities.desc: Finishing move that causes damage per combo point.

abilities.name: Garrote
abilities.desc: Garrote the enemy, causing damage now and bleeding it for $d over 18 sec. Must be stealthed. Awards 1 combo point.

abilities.name: Backstab
abilities.desc: Backstab the target for 150% weapon damage plus $d. Must be behind the target. Requires a dagger. Awards 1 combo point.

abilities.name: Gouge
abilities.desc: Strikes the target, incapacitating it for 4 sec. Any damage breaks the effect. Awards 1 combo point.

abilities.name: Cheap Shot
abilities.desc: Strike the target, stunning it for 4 sec. Must be stealthed. Awards 2 combo points.

abilities.name: Evasion
abilities.desc: Increases your dodge chance by 50% for 15 sec.

abilities.name: Sap
abilities.desc: Incapacitates the target for 8 sec. Must be stealthed and out of combat. Any damage breaks the effect.

abilities.name: Slice and Dice
abilities.desc: Finishing move that increases melee attack speed by 30%. Lasts longer per combo point.

abilities.name: Sprint
abilities.desc: Increases your movement speed by 70% for 15 sec.

abilities.name: Crippling Poison
abilities.desc: Strikes the target with a crippling poison, dealing {damage} Nature damage and slowing its movement speed by 50% for 12 sec.

abilities.name: Kidney Shot
abilities.desc: Finishing move that stuns the target. Lasts 1 sec longer per combo point.

abilities.name: Expose Armor
abilities.desc: Finishing move that exposes the target, reducing its armor. More combo points spent build into a deeper cut.

abilities.name: Ambush
abilities.desc: Ambush the target for 250% weapon damage plus $d. Must be stealthed and behind the target. Requires a dagger. Awards 1 combo point.

abilities.name: Rupture
abilities.desc: Finishing move that wounds the target, causing it to bleed for $d over 16 sec.

abilities.name: Vanish
abilities.desc: Vanish from sight, entering Stealth even in combat. You move 30% slower while hidden. Lasts up to 10 sec.

abilities.name: Instant Poison
abilities.desc: Coats your weapon for 30 min, causing each of your melee swings to deal 8 additional Nature damage.

abilities.name: Adrenaline Rush
abilities.desc: Your blood runs hot, instantly restoring 60 energy.

abilities.name: Deadly Poison
abilities.desc: Coats your weapon for 30 min, causing each of your melee swings to deal 14 additional Nature damage.

abilities.name: Blind
abilities.desc: Blinds the target, causing it to wander disoriented for 8 sec. Any damage breaks the effect.

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.desc: Conceals you in the shadows: enemies barely notice you, but you move 30% slower. Attacking or taking damage breaks Stealth. Cast again to step out.

playbook: You are playing a Rogue (energy-based, melee).
Goal: gain XP safely — kill mobs at or below your level, complete quests, stay alive.
SURVIVE: if HP < 25% and a mob is hitting you, flee or use a defensive; if safe and HP < 60%, eat/consume.
RESOURCE: energy builds in combat — open with a builder.
ENGAGE: pick the nearest hostile within range of your goal, close to 5 yards (face it), then attack.
ROTATE: cast the first ready ability in "rotation" each GCD (respect cost/cooldown/range/line-of-sight); auto-attack fills the gaps.
LOOT/QUEST: after a kill, loot the corpse; interact with quest objects/NPCs the objective needs.
Avoid pulling Elite/Rare mobs above your level, and don't pull more than you can handle.
